title: Language change - Case Update Needed popup is not present after Language Change
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup fails to appear after changing the app language, though it should only show after a firmware DFU for earbuds.
steps: Change the language to a different language
Observe whether the 'Case Update Needed' popup appears
expected: The "Case Update Needed" popup should NOT appear after a language change. It should only appear after a firmware DFU for earbuds (via Settings > Software Update).
